nasb.text: And at once his mouth was opened and his tongue loosed, and he began to speak in praise of God.

esv.text: And immediately his mouth was opened and his tongue loosed, and he spoke, blessing God.

cnv.text: 撒迦利亞的口舌立刻開了，就出聲稱頌　神。

ccb.text: 就在那时，撒迦利亚恢复了说话的能力，便开口赞美上帝。

csbs.text: 撒迦利亚的口立刻开了，舌头也松了，就说出话来，颂赞神。
